message:
feat(cli): register new commands in CLI enum

Adds the new feature commands to the Commands enum for clap parsing:
- Inbox: Check Agent Mail inbox for inter-agent messages
- Contract: Manage pack contracts for skill packing customization
- Simulate: Run skills in sandboxed execution environment

These commands were implemented in their respective feature commits
but the CLI enum registration was not included.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
